metaDescription: Marjorie – interdisciplinary support in coaching, psychological counselling and research. Warm, mindful and culturally sensitive.

about.heading: About Me
paragraphs: With an interdisciplinary approach that combines psychological counselling, coaching and research, I accompany people on their personal path of development. My work is characterised by warmth, mindfulness and a deep understanding of the complexity of human experience.
By integrating body work, creative forms of expression and a scientific foundation, I create a space in which transformation becomes possible.
about.quote: "Growth happens when we meet ourselves with compassion and find the courage to live authentically."

services.heading: My Services
services.subheading: Holistic support for your personal development

items.title: Psychological Counselling
items.text: Empathetic, in-depth support with an integrative approach that connects body, mind and soul. A space for personal growth and development.

items.title: Coaching
items.text: Professional support during life transitions, professional challenges and the unfolding of your full potential.

items.title: Research
items.text: Academic research at the intersection of psychology, social sciences and embodiment studies.

gallery.heading: Impressions
gallery.subheading: Insights into my work and inspirations

approach.heading: My Approach
approach.text: I work with a deep respect for the uniqueness of every person. My approach combines scientific insight with embodied wisdom, cultural sensitivity and creative forms of expression. In a safe, appreciative space, I support you in discovering your inner resources and finding your own path.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.text: I look forward to meeting you and finding out together how I can support you on your path.
